## Meeting Purpose

[Kick-off meeting between LightSource and GrowthX to discuss content marketing strategy and collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LightSource is seeking to scale content production, focusing on direct materials procurement software for enterprise manufacturers](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Current marketing efforts are fragmented; goal is to create cohesive strategy and increase inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [GrowthX will develop content artifacts and strategy over 8-week sprint, aiming for SEO/AEO lift and pipeline generation](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [LightSource's ideal customers are complex product manufacturers, with procurement managers as primary users/buyers](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

## Topics

### LightSource Overview and Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Series A startup focused on direct materials procurement software](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Recent website revamp, messaging updates, and RevOps reboot](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Current marketing: events-focused with some digital and outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Goal: Scale content production and quality to drive leads and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### LightSource Product and Value Proposition

  - [Manages direct sourcing process for complex manufacturing](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Key features: revision management, quote handling, flexible data collection](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Differentiators: All-in-one solution, user-centric design, speed, AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Displacing manual processes and legacy systems in most cases](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

### Target Customers and Industries

  - [Enterprise manufacturers (Global 2000, Fortune 500) producing complex products](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [Key industries: automotive, aerospace/defense, consumer electronics, medical devices](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
  - [Primary users: Procurement teams (managers, category managers, buyers)](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [Other stakeholders: Supply chain, IT, engineering, finance, quality teams](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)

### Sales Triggers and Objections

  - [Triggers: New product launches, new procurement leadership, PE acquisitions, digital transformation initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [Objections: Internal build preference, all-in-one suite implementations, price (perceived value), RFP processes favoring feature checklists](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3075.0)

### Current Lead Sources

  - [Referrals/word-of-mouth: \~50%](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3383.0)
  - [Outbound efforts: \~35%](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3322.0)
  - [Events: \~28%](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3304.0)
  - [Inbound: \~19%](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3301.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Increase inbound lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Improve SEO/AEO (AI-driven search) performance](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Create shareable, valuable content for team and customers](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Develop educational resources (e.g., procurement glossary, courses)](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

### Brand Positioning

  - ["Explorer" brand persona, likened to Anthony Bourdain](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3592.0)
  - [Balance of high-tech expertise with renegade, thought leadership approach](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3604.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send "what we heard" document summarizing kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3724.0)
  - [Schedule product deep-dive demo with LightSource team](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3739.0)
  - [Set up weekly check-in meetings](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3745.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop initial content artifacts for LightSource review by end of week/early next week](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3754.0)
  - [LightSource to share additional documentation (brand guide, personas, etc.) in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/jraBSUn-9zSAVMrGYHxEP1Yeiy_AwJbB?tab=summary&timestamp=3709.0)
